meaning: v.缩回,缩进,所卷(舌等),收回,取消,撤消
examples: They tried to persuade me to retract my words.
He's hoping that if he makes me feel guilty, I'll retract.
Mr. Smith hurriedly sought to retract the statement, but it had just been broadcast on national radio.
When you walk away again, they go dark, the handles retract and the car enters its stealth mode.
What if they retract the roof at half-time, will the market split the difference?
